name: Region delivery anomaly alert
description: Region REG_NORTHEAST has late delivery rate 0.18 (baseline 0.05, delta +0.13, HIGH). Multiple sellers in the region are affected. Recent orders show consistent 3-5 day delays.
scenario: Region-wide delivery degradation affecting multiple sellers simultaneously, indicating a systemic logistics problem rather than individual seller issues.

evidence.description: 7-day rolling late delivery rate for the region
Total order volume in the region over the past 7 days
Average delivery delay in days for the region over the past 7 days
Number of sellers with late delivery rate above threshold in the region

confidence.description: Confidence must be at least 0.75 given strong, multi-source evidence

reasoning_requirements: Must reference region_late_delivery_rate_7d as primary metric evidence
Must mention that multiple sellers are affected (region_affected_seller_count or link:sellers)
Must reference average delay magnitude of 3-5 days (region_avg_delay_days_7d)
Must indicate the issue is systemic, not seller-specific

params_constraints.description: Must recommend a logistics review task for the REG_NORTHEAST region

categories.name: decision_type
categories.description: Decision must be 'escalate' (systemic region-wide issue, not monitor-only)

categories.name: required_evidence_refs
categories.description: Must reference all required evidence items: region_late_delivery_rate_7d, region_order_count_7d, link:sellers

categories.name: action_recommendation
categories.description: Must recommend create_followup_task with logistics_review task_type

categories.name: reasoning_quality
categories.description: Reasoning must demonstrate understanding that this is a systemic region-wide issue (not individual seller), reference the delay magnitude (3-5 days), and identify logistics as the root cause area
